scripts.test: npm run compile && set LOCALAPPDATA=%CD%\.hardhat-local&& node test/CredentialRegistry.test.js
scripts.deploy:sepolia: set LOCALAPPDATA=%CD%\.hardhat-local&& hardhat ignition deploy scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia --config hardhat.config.cjs
scripts.read:registry: set LOCALAPPDATA=%CD%\.hardhat-local&& hardhat run scripts/read-registry-ethers.js --network sepolia --config hardhat.config.cjs
scripts.write:registry: set LOCALAPPDATA=%CD%\.hardhat-local&& hardhat run scripts/write-registry-ethers.js --network sepolia --config hardhat.config.cjs
